title: Anti-typicality configuration
description: Configuration for Sprint 16 anti-typicality interventions: Verbalized Sampling (VS) and the originality_vs_history critic dimension. Defaults are calibrated against Zhang et al. 2025 (arXiv:2510.01171) for vs_alpha and against the existing taste-aging window for the history-related fields.

$schema.description: Optional pointer back to this schema. Accepted but not validated.

version.description: Semver of the config file shape. Bump on breaking changes to anti_typicality fields.

enabled.description: Master switch for the entire anti-typicality stack. false = behave like pre-sprint-16.

vs_alpha.description: Anti-typicality boost exponent for Verbalized Sampling. Zhang 2025 sweet spot is 0.6-0.7; default 0.65.

vs_concept_count.description: Number of concepts the VS partial returns. 5 balances diversity vs token cost; raising past 7 typically harms distribution quality.

vs_convergence_threshold.description: Pairwise cosine/jaccard above which the VS output is considered converged and a re-prompt is triggered. 0.85 is the empirical break-point where designs differ only in wording.

vs_max_retries_on_schema_fail.description: How many times to re-prompt when the VS JSON output fails schema validation before falling back to skipping Stage 1.5.

originality_weight.description: Weight of the originality_vs_history dimension in the multi-critic arbitration table. 0.8 keeps it below craft/aesthetic (1.0) but above designer (0.25).

originality_history_window.description: Top-N most-recent accepted entries from taste/facts.jsonl that the originality critic compares against.

originality_history_max_age_days.description: Cut-off in days for considering an accepted entry part of the comparison set. Match the taste-aging active->decayed threshold so the two systems agree on what counts as 'recent'.

boost_factor_cap.description: Upper clamp on the (1/p)^alpha anti-typicality boost. Prevents runaway selection of single-occurrence low-prob outliers.

boost_factor_floor.description: Lower clamp on the boost. Keeps high-probability candidates from being penalised below this fraction of their original weight.

min_concept_quality_threshold.description: Concepts with a rationale shorter than this fraction of the longest sibling rationale get filtered before sampling. Defends against degenerate one-word stubs.

_doc.description: Free-form developer documentation embedded next to the config. Validators ignore the contents.
